action_plan_instructions.description: Instructions on how to implement the action plan for this control.

action_plan_title.description: The title of the action plan associated with this control.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies this control.

description.description: A detailed description of this control.

id.description: The unique identifier for this control.

tags.description: A set of tags associated with this control, represented as key-value pairs.

testing_information.description: Information on how to test this control to ensure it is working as expected.
